title: Practice Admin step-group node unlink scaffold
goal: Add a minimal inverse operation for TASK-132 by deleting one practice_step_group_nodes row from /practice/admin and updating bundle/summary locally without touching node base tables
constraints: no schema or RPC changes; no recipe/action/ingredient row delete; no CSS edits; preserve selectedMenuIdRef stale-guard; zero-node group allowed; worker docs only as allowed auxiliary files
acceptance: build pass; lint pass with only pre-existing src/hooks/useGameTick.ts:73 warning; self-reviewer approved; tsc pass; regression vitest pass; files_changed limited to scope plus allowed worker docs; extra_changes false
